cmd:
sed -i '23,29c\
  /**\
   * Get the client IP address from the request.\
   *\
   * Fixed: Only trust socket address to prevent header spoofing.\
   * In a production environment with trusted proxies, additional \
   * configuration would be needed to safely parse X-Forwarded-For.\
   */' ./app/ratelimiter.ts

sed -i '22,23c\  /**' ./app/ratelimiter.ts && sed -i '23c\   * Get the client IP address from the request.' ./app/ratelimiter.ts && sed -i '24c\   *' ./app/ratelimiter.ts && sed -i '25c\   * Fixed: Only trust socket address to prevent header spoofing.' ./app/ratelimiter.ts && sed -i '26c\   * In a production environment with trusted proxies, additional \' ./app/ratelimiter.ts && sed -i '27c\   * configuration would be needed to safely parse X-Forwarded-For.' ./app/ratelimizer.ts
